# onegadget

## Description



Find gadgets which single-handedly give code execution.

Uses the onegadget tool by david942j.

## Usage:


```bash
usage: onegadget [-h] [--show-unsat] [--no-unknown] [-v]

```
## Optional Arguments

|Short|Long|Default|Help|
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
|`-h`|`--help`||show this help message and exit|
||`--show-unsat`||Show unsatisfiable gadgets. (default: %(default)s)|
||`--no-unknown`||Do not show unknown gadgets. (default: %(default)s)|
|`-v`|`--verbose`||Show verbose output. (default: %(default)s)|
